name: Australian Clinical Labs Limited
analysis: ACL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.1100. Trade idea: entry A$2.2600, stop A$1.9503, target A$2.6531 (1.27:1) — then trail it.
